diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Mechanical fall with right rib fractures
diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: Hemothorax, subcapsular liver contusion, forehead laceration, urinary tract infection, urinary retention, toxic-metabolic encephalopathy
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient experienced a mechanical fall resulting in right rib fractures, which were confirmed on imaging. Additionally, signs suggested other complications such as a hemothorax and urinary tract infection, likely contributing to her confusion and altered mental status.
